title: OpenClaw Launch – deploy a managed OpenClaw AI agent in 30s
abstract: Get your very own managed OpenClaw AI agent up and running in just 30 seconds! Think of it like summoning a magical Pokémon at the touch of a button. Deploy, learn, and grow with ease. Ready to make your workload lighter? Give it a try!
abstract_zh: 你还在等什么？只需30秒，OpenClaw 就能成为你的私人AI管家！就像召唤一只神奇宝贝一样简单，一键部署，它会自动学习和成长。赶紧试试吧，让工作更轻松！
